name: LIBERTY PULTRUSIONS
message: BauVal was founded in 1954 on the South Shore of Montreal and was first specialized in civil engineering and road systems. Now called Le Groupe Bau-Val inc. and encompassing all affiliated divisions and companies, the enterprise is truly setting itself as the leader in a plethora of sectors, such as managing civil engineering projects and complex structures, transforming aggregates, manufacturing concrete, building material and conventional and low-energy plant mix, as well as transportation and drilling & blasting. In this release we will show you 87 GB of their corporate data.
